# CWE-549 positive: signup preview echoes password field (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-549-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

func PreviewSignup(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = r.ParseForm()
	pass := r.FormValue("password")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{
		"email":    r.FormValue("email"),
		"password": pass,
	})
}
